title: delegation policy: all commands use mandatory Haiku/Codex/Opus routing in CLAUDE.md
desc: Project CLAUDE.md applies mandatory agent delegation for all wkappbot commands. Haiku for read/survey, Codex for execution, Opus for design.
steps: All commands affected: chores via Haiku (Agent model haiku), execution via Codex (wkappbot ask codex), design/judgment via Opus (Agent model opus). CLAUDE.md at <repo-root>/CLAUDE.md section DELEGATION RULES MANDATORY.
Triad for ambiguous/planning tasks. Session stays on Sonnet. Escalate the subagent not the session.
Anti-patterns: reading 5+ files solo, deep-diving bug 10+ tool calls, repo-wide cleanup inline. All forbidden.
author: claude
